label: DeFi Atomic Bundles
description: DeFi-specific atomic bundle builder with Flash Loan Arb, Leverage Long, and Yield Harvest pre-built templates. Gas estimation and Tenderly simulation preview.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore (string 'any' in UI text is not a TS type).

0.5.note: No mock imports; DEFI_TEMPLATES from lib/config/services/defi-bundles.config.

0.6.note: Widget uses local DefiOp[] state (no async fetch); template selection is the pre-data state.

0.7.note: Empty states: pre-template state (showTemplates+empty ops) and ops.length===0+!showTemplates guard.

0.8.note: No error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers render errors.

0.9.note: No dead code. readOnly from useBundlesData() wired to disable Add Operation, Clear all, Simulate, Execute Bundle in batch mode.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass (0.6, 0.8 N/A for pure local-state widget).

1.1.note: Widget manages its own DefiOp[] local state rather than reading from a domain data context hook. readOnly sourced from useBundlesData(). Recommend DefiAtomicBundlesDataContext in follow-up to fully satisfy 1.1.

1.2.note: readOnly sourced via useBundlesData() which reads useExecutionMode() and useGlobalScope().

1.3.note: Operations are user-authored local state; org scope filtering not applicable at widget level.

1.4.note: Operations are user-authored local state; client cascade not applicable.

1.5.note: Operations are user-authored local state; strategy cascade not applicable.

1.6.note: No scope-filtered data at widget level; all scope handling via readOnly from context.

1.7.note: All reference data (DEFI_OPERATIONS, DEFI_TOKENS, DEFI_TEMPLATES, GAS_ESTIMATES, gasToUsd) in lib/config/services/defi-bundles.config.

l1.notes: 1.1 PARTIAL — local DefiOp[] state instead of domain context hook (intentional design, different data model from BundleStep). 1.2–1.6 N/A at widget level. 1.7 pass.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live=full op building + Tenderly sim + Execute; paper=full building (testnet); batch=readOnly=true — Add Operation, Clear all, Simulate, Execute disabled.

3.2.note: readOnly sourced from useBundlesData() which reads isBatch from useExecutionMode().

3.3.note: Human verify: batch mode → Add Operation, Clear all, Simulate on Tenderly, Execute Bundle buttons all visually disabled.

3.4.note: Human verify: batch/as-of indicator visible in surrounding layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: all op building enabled; gas estimates remain live-chain constants (testnet gas separate topic). Expected: same UI flow on paper, execution routes to testnet.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or setInterval in this widget.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1, 3.2, 3.5, 3.6 complete. Human must verify 3.3, 3.4.

4.1.note: Simulate on Tenderly and Execute Bundle buttons have no onClick handlers — dead buttons. Known issue flagged for L4 wiring. All other buttons (addOp, removeOp, moveOp, loadTemplate, Clear all) are wired.

4.3.note: Human: verify all op fields (operation type, token, amount, gas readout) display correctly.

4.4.note: Human: verify Simulate → Tenderly result; Execute → bundle submission.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks inside widget render.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.2, 4.5, 4.6 pass. 4.1 FAIL — Simulate and Execute dead buttons. Human must complete 4.3, 4.4.

5.1.note: Target strategies: CARRY_STAKED_BASIS (staking+lending+perp: STAKE→LEND→SWAP→BORROW ops), CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED (recursive lending: LEND→BORROW→SWAP loop), ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION (flash-loan arb: FLASH_LOAN→SWAP→SWAP→REPAY), LIQUIDATION_CAPTURE (liquidation bot: FLASH_LOAN→LIQUIDATE→SWAP→REPAY). Widget covers DeFi-only strategies requiring atomic on-chain execution.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented against defi-atomic-bundle.json existing gaps data. Human must complete 5.2–5.6 walkthrough.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. Semantic classes (text-amber-400, text-emerald-400, text-rose-400, bg-emerald-600, border-amber-500/30, bg-amber-500/5) are design-system sentiment/brand colors.

7.2.note: No mock imports. All reference data from lib/config/services/defi-bundles.config.

7.3.note: 393 lines — within 500-line limit. Single DefiAtomicBundleWidget function is 351 lines; close to 200-line guidance but this is a complex multi-section builder (template picker + op editor + sim preview) that does not split cleanly without prop-drilling. Acceptable for now; recommend sub-component extraction in follow-up.

7.4.note: Component PascalCase (DefiAtomicBundleWidget), file kebab-case (defi-atomic-bundle-widget.tsx). Internal callbacks (addOp, removeOp, moveOp, updateOp, loadTemplate) are camelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: All callbacks wrapped in useCallback with correct deps. useMemo not used (totalGas/totalGasUsd are simple reduces — acceptable). No inline object/array literals in effect deps.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.3 note: component is at 351 lines, recommend sub-component extraction in follow-up. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro), text-[9px] with text-nano (--text-nano), and text-[8px] with text-pico (--text-pico). Tokens landed in globals.css.

8.2.note: Replaced mt-[-12px] (line 194) with Tailwind -mt-3 utility (-12px on 4px scale). No custom token needed.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Badge, Input, Select, Separator from components/ui/*. Template cards use native <button type='button'>. Sim preview uses semantic divs (display-only). No interactive divs without role.

8.4.note: Added aria-label to all icon-only buttons: Move step N up/down (lines 214–230), Remove step N (lines 231–238). Labels are contextual per index.

8.5.note: Human: verify at minW=4, minH=5 — template grid and op list should scroll without horizontal overflow.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (text-micro/text-nano/text-pico applied). 8.2 fixed (-mt-3 utility). 8.3 pass. 8.4 fixed. 8.5 human verify.

keepSeparate.rationale: DefiAtomicBundleWidget manages its own DefiOp[] state (distinct from BundleStep used by other 4 bundles widgets). Different data model (DeFi on-chain operations vs generic trading legs), different execution path (Tenderly simulation, atomic on-chain), and different minW/minH constraints. Merging with bundle-steps would require a single shared type and would lose DeFi-specific fields (token, estimatedGas per op).

relationships.notes: Operates alongside the 4 CeFi bundle widgets in the same tab preset but manages its own state independently. Only shares readOnly from BundlesDataContext.

dataContract.notes: Simulate button should POST to Tenderly simulation API on-demand (not yet wired — dead button). Execute button should submit to on-chain execution service. Gas estimates currently static from GAS_ESTIMATES config map. In production: gas estimates should call chain RPC (eth_estimateGas) per operation.

gaps: SUPPORTED: CARRY_STAKED_BASIS — 3-leg atomic instruction; bridge path for cross-chain perp
SUPPORTED: CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED — liquidation-cascade risk declared; per-protocol bonus schedule gap in UAC
PARTIAL: ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION — flash-loan receiver contract per-chain registry missing from UAC; deployed on testnet only on some chains
SUPPORTED: LIQUIDATION_CAPTURE — flash-loan receiver deployed on Ethereum; per-protocol bonus schedule gap in UAC
Simulate on Tenderly button has no onClick handler — DeFi simulation not wired
Execute Bundle button has no onClick handler — on-chain execution not wired
coverage.notes: Widget covers DeFi-only strategies requiring atomic on-chain execution. CeFi coverage is out of scope for this widget — bundle-steps handles CeFi multi-leg execution.

knownIssues: Widget uses local DefiOp[] state instead of a domain data context hook — recommend DefiAtomicBundlesDataContext (L1.1 partial)
Simulate on Tenderly button has no onClick handler — dead button (L4 scope)
Execute Bundle button has no onClick handler — dead button (L4 scope)
Component function is 351 lines — recommend sub-component extraction (TemplateGallery, OpEditor, SimPreview) in follow-up

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: defi-atomic-bundle-widget.tsx — text-[10px] at 16 locations; text-[9px] at line 122; text-[8px] at lines 155, 188. No tailwind token for sub-xs sizes.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro 0.625rem), text-[9px] with text-nano (--text-nano 0.5625rem), and text-[8px] with text-pico (--text-pico 0.5rem) (2026-04-21)

findings.description: defi-atomic-bundle-widget.tsx:194 — mt-[-12px] used for visual flow arrow vertical offset. No semantic negative-margin token.
findings.fix: Used Tailwind -mt-3 utility (-12px spacing token), no new token needed (2026-04-21)

findings.description: defi-atomic-bundle-widget.tsx — icon-only buttons (ChevronUp, ChevronDown, Trash2) missing aria-label
findings.fix: Added aria-label='Move step N up', 'Move step N down', 'Remove step N' to all three icon-only buttons per operation row (2026-04-21)
